heading: Federal assistance
label: 9592 Federal assistance
notes: References in TextSections ___101, ___102, and ___103(a), referred to in subsec. (a)(1), probably mean sections 100101, 100102, and 100103(a) of , which are classified to sections 9511, 9512, and 9513(a) of this title.Pub. L. 117–58Section ___116, referred to in subsec. children.heading: Provision of Federal assistance
children.label: 1 Provision of Federal assistance
children.text: To carry out sections ___101, ___102, and ___103(a), the Under Secretary may provide Federal assistance to public sector entities and private sector entities in the form of grants or cooperative agreements.1So in original. See References in Text note below.1

children.label: A
children.text: the actual, or anticipated, amount of Federal assistance that will, or may, be made available;

children.label: B
children.text: the types of Federal assistance that will, or may, be made available;

children.label: C
children.text: the manner in which Federal assistance will be allocated among public sector entities and private sector entities, as applicable; and

children.label: D
children.text: the methodology used by the Under Secretary to make allocations under subparagraph (C).

children.heading: Consultation
children.label: 3 Consultation
children.text: The Under Secretary shall consult with public sector entities and private sector entities, as applicable, in deciding the amounts and types of Federal assistance to make available under paragraph (1).

children.heading: Publicity
children.label: b Publicity
children.text: In carrying out this section, the Under Secretary shall broadly publicize all opportunities for Federal assistance available under this section, including through the means required under section ___116.1
